description_long: This house features a rectangular main structure with a gable roof covered in gray shingles and accented by blue trim. The exterior walls are light gray with blue-framed windows and doors, providing a modern yet modest appearance. A smaller extension with its own gable roof projects from the front, serving as a porch or entry vestibule, and is accessed by a set of concrete steps. Metal gutters and downspouts run along the roof edges, and a chimney is visible on one side, suggesting a fireplace or stove inside. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the main facades, with a mix of single and double panes. The house sits on a concrete foundation slab, with a small paved area in front of the entryway.
description: A modern, gable-roofed house with blue trim, gray walls, and a prominent front entry extension. Symmetrical windows and a chimney add to its residential character.
description_view_0: Side view showing two blue-trimmed windows, the main gable roof, and the entry extension to the left.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the chimney, a single window, and an upper-level door or window under the gable peak.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two blue-trimmed windows and the entry extension visible to the right.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry extension with large windows, steps, and the main gable roof above.
attribute_entryway_design: Front entry extension with steps, large window, and a simple overhang
